title: Junior Conveyancing (CVY) Lawyer / Associate
description:
Job Description

We are seeking a Junior Conveyancing (CVY) Lawyer / Associate to join our firm’s conveyancing practice. The successful candidate will assist in handling a full range of conveyancing and property-related matters, including residential and commercial transactions, under the supervision of senior lawyers.

The role is suitable for a junior lawyer who is keen to build a strong foundation in conveyancing practice and develop technical competence, attention to detail, and professional client-handling skills.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in handling residential and commercial conveyancing transactions, including purchases, sales, refinancing, and transfers.

  • Prepare, review, and manage conveyancing documentation such as:

    • Option to Purchase (OTP)

    • Sale and Purchase Agreements

    • Mortgage and security documents

    • CPF-related documentation

  • Conduct title searches, due diligence, and requisitions.

  • Liaise with clients, banks, developers, CPF Board, IRAS, and other stakeholders.

  • Manage conveyancing timelines and ensure compliance with statutory and regulatory requirements.

  • Assist in completion matters, including settlement statements and post-completion work.

  • Maintain accurate and organised file records in accordance with firm procedures.

  • Perform other legal and administrative duties as assigned by supervising lawyers.

    Job Requirements

    Qualifications

    • Admitted as an Advocate and Solicitor of the Supreme Court of Singapore, or

    • Recently qualified / Newly admitted lawyer with an interest in conveyancing practice.

    Experience

    • 0–2 years of post-qualification experience in conveyancing or property-related work is preferred.

    • Fresh graduates or newly called lawyers with conveyancing exposure during training will be considered.

    Skills & Competencies

    • Basic knowledge of Singapore conveyancing laws and procedures.

    • Strong attention to detail and good organisational skills.

    • Ability to manage multiple files and meet deadlines.

    • Good written and verbal communication skills.

    • Professional, responsible, and client-focused attitude.

    • Ability to work independently as well as in a team.

    • Willingness to learn and take instructions from senior lawyers.

    Technical Requirements

    Familiarity with SLA, INLIS, e-Lodgment, CPF submission systems, and conveyancing software is an advantage but not mandatory.

    Attributes

    • High level of integrity and professionalism.

    • Positive work ethic and willingness to grow within the practice.

    • Calm and methodical under time pressure.

postedCompany.description:
We provide a wide range of legal solutions spanning across a wide practice of law including commercial litigation, corporate law, family law, Syariah law, criminal law, intellectual property law, amongst others.


We pride ourselves on providing high calibre work and finding the best possible legal solutions for our clients. As strong advocates, we are trusted by our clients to represent or advise them in both simple and complex matters. The firm has successfully handled disputes in the excess of millions and continues to do so.


Previously known as B. Rao & K.S. Rajah, the firm was established on 29 June 1987 and has through the years contributed to and continues to contribute to the development of the law in Singapore.


Our team of dedicated lawyers are committed to assisting you.
postedCompany.name: EMERALD LAW LLC

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
